integration.laneBasePolicy: Use `git rev-parse HEAD` in the integration worktree when launching each lane. Do not hard-code the campaign-control commit SHA inside this file.

lastMergedLane.note: Diagnostic dirty target replay refresh only. checkpoints.name: Feature And Catalog Substrates
checkpoints.notes: CP4 complete. FU01D was refreshed after source commit 53642cf0b1bc98f4426b6081fe37c98a960939fc added copied executable protection/charm/ward route connectors; the selected FU01D rows are now accepted by reducer-entrypoint route replay evidence.

checkpoints.name: Remaining Battle Families
checkpoints.notes: CP5 complete. All six remaining battle-family sublanes are merged and verified. Accepted CP5 coverage is 13 net-new drivers and 105 net-new obligations, with target-blocked/out-of-scope rows kept out of accepted coverage.

checkpoints.name: Closure Sweep
checkpoints.notes: Closure sweep refreshed after FU01D accepted evidence. CP6_AUDIT.json records 643 accepted pass obligations, 25 explicit target blockers, 0 source-QNT corpus blockers, 36 out-of-scope obligations, and 0 unresolved in-scope obligations.

checkpoints.name: Post-CP6 Target Blocker Reduction
checkpoints.notes: CP7 target-side blocker reduction closed after source refresh d5a70b23. The nine scenario transition rows are now out-of-scope transit-only fixture rows, and Mage Armor route ownership is supplied by the generic SpellBaseArmorClassEffectRouteSubject connector.
checkpoints.nextBoundary: CP8 handles the three remaining Mage Armor target replay rows against the refreshed cleanroom package.

checkpoints.name: Post-Refresh Mage Armor Route Acceptance
checkpoints.notes: Merged and verified CP8. The three remaining Mage Armor admission/lifecycle rows are accepted through observed BattleEntrypointTrace route events matching SpellBaseArmorClassEffectRouteSubject; scenario sequencing rows remain out of scope per refreshed source inventory.

workerSummary: Added route evidence for Adrenaline Rush, Halfling Nimbleness, species passive traits, Danger Sense, and roll modifier buff selected identity.

reviewFindings: Target replay evidence mislabels projection witnesses as route evidence: accepted rows declare literal-projection-witness while also claiming comparator route-event-list and projection qRoute.
Lane tests compare observed state witnesses to expected_witness rather than observed reducer routes to independent expected route records, so route-event acceptance is overclaimed.
fixSummary: Replaced projection-only witness comparisons with reducer-route comparisons for all five lane drivers.
Focused adapter tests now compare replay_observed_route(action) against independent expected_route(action) records before evidence claims qRoute / route-event-list.
Accepted all 17 lane obligations; no blockers reported by fixer.
rereviewFindings: Observed route evidence is still adapter-synthesized, not emitted by the production reducer route/observer path. The focused tests compare replay_*_route(action) to expected_*_route(action), but replay_observed_route is mostly hardcoded adapter-local ReducerRouteEvent vectors.

Danger Sense, roll modifier buff, species passive trait, Halfling Nimbleness, and Adrenaline Rush adapters still overclaim reducer-route-witness / qRoute / route-event-list because observed route lists are not produced by the reducer surface.
fix2Summary: Observed route evidence now comes from production BattleReducerRouteTrace emission and is translated by the adapter for comparison against independent expected route records.
Accepted all lane A obligations for Adrenaline Rush, Danger Sense, Roll Modifier Buff, Species Passive Traits, and Halfling Nimbleness substrate routes.
No production selected-authored-identity dispatch introduced; BattleState.feature_resources ownership preserved.
rereview2Findings: Observed lane A routes are still synthesized in adapters: adapters create BattleReducerRouteTrace::default(), populate it by calling observe_battle_route_* from adapter-local record_* helpers, then translate that trace.

Artifacts still overclaim reducer-routed evidence: target evidence, DECIDER_DECISION, and REVIEW_LOOP say tests compare production BattleReducerRouteTrace-observed output, but observed routes are adapter-authored traces.
fix3Summary: Removed adapter-local accepted route synthesis; no BattleReducerRouteTrace::default plus local observe_battle_route_* calls remain in the cited adapters.
Accepted observed routes now come from production observer entrypoints in battle_reducer_spine and battle_features; adapters select branches and translate returned production traces for comparison.
Accepted all 17 lane A obligations; no blockers reported by fixer.
rereview3Summary: The five lane A adapters no longer create BattleReducerRouteTrace::default() or call observe helpers locally.
Observed routes are translated from traces returned by production reducer/observer entrypoints.
Expected routes remain independent literal route records/lists.
Artifacts describe qRoute / route-event-list evidence honestly and do not claim projection-only evidence as route evidence.
BattleState.feature_resources remains the single battle-state owner for the Adrenaline Rush resource pool; remaining uses are derived from ResourcePoolFacts.
No selected-authored-identity string/id dispatch found in changed src/rules code.

operatorNotes: Update this file after every lane status change, merge, checkpoint transition, and integration verification.

If the integration HEAD changes outside this campaign, stop and reconcile before launching more Ralph workers.

sourceCorpusRefreshRequired.summary: Source refresh supplied the generic spell base Armor Class route connector and moved nine fixture scenario transition rows out of the reducer-route denominator. CP8 target replay accepted the remaining three Mage Armor rows, closing refreshed in-scope coverage at 659/659.

resolvedItems: Encounter composition surface QNT/guidance task resolved by source commit 0387d29f9282037637b4256c3c7f292bab7ef85c and fresh target commit 893198ce66a35c8aad007ad8ac7a61c4631c64d9.

Pact Slot handoff route surfaces for pure Pact Slot and mixed Spell Slot/Pact Slot branches resolved by source commit b57772b459f1b75592fd45b9196fd60965b534d3 and accepted by fresh target commit a30e6729711ddc3f595cf008931ba5cd6265c58a.

postFc07VerifierRefresh.phaseName: Fresh Verifier Refresh After Input Package Update
postFc07VerifierRefresh.scope: Repair fresh-run verifier story after the cleanroom-input refresh so historical FC-03/FC-04/FC-05 evidence is not incorrectly revalidated against the b57772b input package, while current FC-07 evidence remains strictly validated.
checks: forbidden source/dirty implementation path search returned no matches
postFc07VerifierRefresh.result: Fresh target master fast-forwarded to a30e6729711ddc3f595cf008931ba5cd6265c58a. Current gate validates b57772b package inventory, strict FC-07 Pact Slot source-input hashes and route comparisons, SDK tracer surface, and FC-03/FC-04/FC-05 historical snapshot classification.

postFc06PactSlotReplay.scope: Fresh target replay of newly copied Pact Slot handoff route surfaces from character-battle-init-projection.mbt.qnt and character-battle-init-projection.route.mbt.qnt. This did not read TypeScript source or dirty cleanroom src/** implementation files.
postFc06PactSlotReplay.residualRisk: Historical FC-03/FC-04/FC-05 verifier scripts still pin historical source-input hashes. The accepted current gate is python3 tools/verify_current_fresh_target.py, which classifies those artifacts as historical snapshot evidence and strictly verifies the current FC-07 Pact Slot replay against the b57772b package.

activePhase.scope: Audit fresh-run outputs and convert missing reducer-route or handoff facts into source-side QNT/guidance feedback, with special attention to encounter composition surface and Pact Slot route-surface limitations.

previousPhase.scope: Generic character sheet to battle init handoff route evidence through public handoff entrypoints, with successful entry using start_battle and BattleState/CombatantState ownership rather than a parallel handoff cache.
acceptedSurfaces: sheet HP, temporary HP, Armor Class, conditions, and passive Armor Class profile projection
sheet spell slot and metamagic resource projection
build maximum rejection from sheet projection
build maximum rejection from resource projection to prevent bypass
stable recovery progress rejection during battle entry
successful handoff calls start_battle and stores runtime facts in BattleState/CombatantState

limitations.summary: FC-05 recorded this as a limitation because the copied route connector then exposed no generic route surfaces for pure Pact Slot and mixed Spell Slot/Pact Slot branches. Source commit b57772b459f1b75592fd45b9196fd60965b534d3 supplied those route surfaces; fresh target commit a30e6729711ddc3f595cf008931ba5cd6265c58a accepts them through public handoff entrypoints and the current verifier gate.

reviewFindings.summary: Resource projection could bypass the build max-HP gate.
reviewFindings.requiredFix: Require CharacterBuildProjection in project_character_resources_to_battle and add a regression route comparison.

reviewFindings.summary: Evidence overstated projection entrypoints as shared BattleState reducer evidence.
reviewFindings.requiredFix: Classify projection events as character-battle handoff route evidence and only start_battle as shared BattleState reducer evidence.

reviewFindings.summary: FC-05 target commit metadata was pending/null.
reviewFindings.requiredFix: Record committed target metadata and make verify_fc05 require committed status and an ancestor SHA.

reviewFindings.summary: BLOCKERS.json top-level phase metadata was stale.
reviewFindings.requiredFix: Update top-level phase metadata to FC-05 accepted-with-limitations while retaining older blockers and limitations.

previousPhase.residualRisk: FC-05 itself proves handoff-route projection plus shared BattleState entry, not a full character-creation-to-battle gameplay scenario. The later SDK-style tracer bullet and current fresh verifier are accepted in this same campaign state.

earlierReviewedPhase.scope: Generic save-gated spell ordering connector route through shared reducer entrypoints, with grouped selected-identity drivers explicitly blocked rather than overclaimed.
earlierReviewedPhase.residualRisk: FC-03 proves route/hole-owner evidence only. It does not prove concrete save-gated HP damage application; the final BattleHitPointOwner event is route ownership, not effect parity.

earlierReviewedPhaseFc02.scope: Tiny weapon attack/action route through shared reducer entrypoints using battle-runtime-weapon-attack-skeleton route connector evidence.
earlierReviewedPhaseFc02.residualRisk: Expected route independence is inspectable in tests/evidence but not mechanically proven against the QNT file by the verifier.

earlierReviewedPhaseFc01.scope: Minimal shared BattleState reducer surface, typed subject/fill/hole/outcome/route-event vocabulary, route observation emitted by reducer entrypoints, and FC-01 evidence/state-owner artifacts.

reviewFindings.summary: resolve_battle_subject accepts foreign subjects from another BattleState when id/generation/actor collide, allowing adapter-local helper synthesis and caller-influenced observed route evidence.
reviewFindings.requiredFix: Require reducer-owned subject identity from the same BattleState, validate full subject/profile/hole state or add a state-scoped token, and emit route events from stored reducer subject data rather than caller-supplied subject data.

reviewFindings.summary: resolve_battle_subject removes the stored SubjectProgress before target validation; invalid target input can erase the reducer-owned subject frontier and make a later valid fill look undiscovered.
reviewFindings.requiredFix: Validate before removal or reinsert the stored progress on validation failure, then add regression coverage proving invalid table input does not consume the open subject frontier.

completionGates.gate: SDK tracer bullet public programmatic surface
Current fresh target verifier after b57772b input refresh

earlierReviewedPhaseFc04.scope: Generic base Armor Class effect route evidence through shared reducer entrypoints using battle-runtime-spell-base-armor-class-effect.route.mbt.qnt; selected spell identity remains limited to evidence/test/source-input citation boundaries.
earlierReviewedPhaseFc04.residualRisk: The target worktree did not contain .claude/review-rules.md inside the allowed fresh-cleanroom review boundary; reviewer used the campaign/source package boundaries and AGENTS instructions.

nextWorkRecommendations: Use tasks/campaigns/level-1-2-runtime-reducer-route/FRESH_CLEANROOM_EXPANSION_PLAN.md and FRESH_EXPANSION_LANES.json as the next executable fresh-cleanroom campaign boundary.

Use the accepted fresh target at a30e6729711ddc3f595cf008931ba5cd6265c58a as the current strongest evidence for SDK composition plus Pact Slot handoff replay, verified by python3 tools/verify_current_fresh_target.py.
Use the fresh SDK tracer success as evidence that encounter composition must be QNT-inferable through route connectors and fact-family sets, not guidance-only prose.
Clean global stale validator-hash / historical evidence debt only if the dirty harness needs to pass without exception.
For later fresh-cleanroom expansion, continue selecting focused QNT route connectors and require observed reducer/handoff route events from public entrypoints.

sdkTracerBullet.fallbackTarget: not needed for this scenario; dirty target remains diagnostic evidence only
sdkTracerBullet.requiredScenario: Use public/programmatic APIs to create a synthetic character sheet, project the character, compose an encounter with non-sheet participants and generic subject profiles, discover and resolve at least one battle act, and advance a complete simple turn.
sdkTracerBullet.evidenceRequirement: Record full-fledged integrated surface evidence and ensure battle behavior goes through reducer entrypoints while character-battle composition emits copied route fact-family events.
sdkTracerBullet.statusDetail: Programmatic sheet creation, projection, encounter composition, BattleState entry, act discovery, subject resolution, HP mutation, action spend, and turn advancement pass through public APIs. The previous missing encounter-composition blocker is closed.
verification: cargo test (23 reducer tests, 3 SDK tracer tests)
